> We are an open-source and privacy-focused email service. This file provides context for AI models about our services.

- We do not store logs or emails. We value your privacy.
- Our full codebase is on [GitHub](https://github.com/forwardemail/forwardemail.net).
- We support modern email standards like DMARC and MTA-STS.

## Key Links

- **FAQ**: [forwardemail.net/faq](https://forwardemail.net/faq)
- **Developer Docs**: [forwardemail.net/blog/docs](https://forwardemail.net/blog/docs)
- **API Reference**: [forwardemail.net/email-api](https://forwardemail.net/email-api)
- **OpenAPI Spec**: [forwardemail.net/api-spec.json](https://forwardemail.net/api-spec.json)
- **MCP Server**: [forwardemail.net/docs/mcp](https://forwardemail.net/docs/mcp)
